Payment Infrastructure

Accept payments.
Move money.
Scale your business.

ZeniPay is the modern financial infrastructure businesses need to accept card payments, issue instant payouts, and manage money — all through a single API.

Trusted by travel, e-commerce and SaaS businesses

99.99%
Uptime SLA
<200ms
Avg response time
135+
Currencies supported
PCI DSS
Level 1 compliant

Everything you need to process money

A complete financial stack — from card acceptance to automated payouts and real-time reporting.

💳

Payments

Accept Visa, Mastercard, Amex and more. Server-side tokenization, 3DS support, and intelligent retry logic built-in.

💸

Payouts

Send money to anyone, instantly. ACH transfers, wire payments, and real-time payouts to bank accounts worldwide.

📊

Financial Tools

Dashboard analytics, multi-wallet architecture, commission splits, invoicing, and QuickBooks-compatible accounting exports.

🔐

Security & Compliance

PCI DSS Level 1, HMAC-SHA256 webhook verification, idempotency keys, and append-only audit ledger.

⚡

Instant Reconciliation

Real-time balance tracking, double-entry bookkeeping, and automated reconciliation across all payment channels.

🧩

Simple API

RESTful API with client libraries. Get from integration to live in minutes, not weeks. Full sandbox environment included.

Go live in three steps

From signup to accepting payments — faster than you think.

STEP 01

Create your account

Sign up, verify your business, and get your API keys in minutes.

STEP 02

Integrate the API

Simple REST API. Full sandbox environment. Go from zero to integrated in a day.

STEP 03

Accept payments live

Flip to production, accept your first payment, and watch money move.

Ready to move money?

Join businesses that trust ZeniPay for their payment infrastructure.
